metadata.description: Best-in-class reference Claude Code plugins, authored and red-teamed with plugins-factory. Each is a self-contained worked example of the five-primitive component model (skill / agent / command / hook / MCP).

plugins.name: brand-forge
plugins.description: Build and evaluate brands grounded in cultural authority — strategy, identity, voice, stewardship — across three seats: a generative Muse, the maker Team, and an adversarial 14-critic Council (parallel isolated agents).

plugins.name: plugins-factory
plugins.description: Run the Claude Code plugin lifecycle against one 9-dimension architecture standard — component fit, boundary cohesion, dependency legality — judged by a 9-critic council that runs as parallel isolated agents. Build with /plugin-author·carve·edit; judge with /plugin-score·critique·promote. Bundles an advisory hook that validates plugin.json/marketplace.json on save (never blocks).

plugins.name: adia-ui-factory
plugins.description: Author and verify apps on the adia-ui (@adia-ai) light-DOM web-component framework — scaffold, compose, wire (SPA + SSR), and verify — leaning on the a2ui MCP for catalog retrieval, generation, and validation.

plugins.name: adia-ui-forge
plugins.description: Author and maintain the adia-ui (@adia-ai) framework itself — primitives (web-components), composite shells (web-modules), the A2UI / gen-ui generation engine and its training corpus, the @adia-ai/llm client, quality sweeps, and release engineering across all @adia-ai packages. The maintainer counterpart to adia-ui-factory (the consumer/app-author plugin).

plugins.name: product-forge
plugins.description: Build and evaluate product strategy, management, and UX across the 12-domain Product Experience Strategy frame — grounded in research and named-practitioner authority, with rubrics, a 23-critic adversarial council, and runnable methodology playbooks.

plugins.name: agent-ops
plugins.description: Author, operate, and review full-spectrum agentic systems and the repos they live in — agent loops & teams, the control plane, harness & context engineering, agentic-workflow UX, and repo memory/docs + architecture review — with a named-practitioner council and verifiable gates (loop blueprints, audit ledgers).
